parsed_review.summary: Claude found no P0/P1 blockers. The slice stays within layout-only boundaries, uses synthetic/no-write evidence, and can close after P2 disposition.

findings.title: Deferral honesty is not verifiable from the diff
findings.disposition: Added explicit preexisting-enum binding semantics, enum-family future-subphase mapping, definesNewEnumValues false, and validator/test/fixture checks. Also verified git diff for packages/control-plane/src/states.js is empty.

findings.title: Closeout pre-records this review as passed
findings.disposition: This file records the actual Claude CLI review session, PASS_WITH_FINDINGS verdict, findings, and dispositions before final RP00 validation is rerun.

findings.title: Validation-theater hygiene
findings.disposition: Accepted as appropriate for a layout slice; semantic checks were strengthened for enum deferral, no-new-values, fixture parity, registry exposure, and no-write boundaries.

findings.title: Negative-path test coverage gaps
findings.disposition: Deferred to future M07 enum-value/policy subphases; current S01 has focused negative coverage for value-completion claims, target file truncation, and enum-family inventory truncation.

findings.title: Dead conditional left behind
findings.disposition: Retained as a historical guard for validating prior current-subphase boundaries; it does not block current S01 because the live nextSubphase check is RP00.P01.M07.S02.
